cycle_148_finding: FC bench eval: Haiku-augmented REGRESSES every metric vs keyword-only (stickiness 1.00→0.80, recall 0.67→0.17, uncaught 3→13). Cycle-145 sticky-pointer architecture validated as quality win, not just latency win. Haiku per-turn = wrong lever.
cycle_147_baseline: FC eval extended 7→17 probes. stickiness=1.00, drift=0.00, recall=0.67, uncaught=3/21 (14%). Inertia hypothesis confirmed on long-inertia + no-anchor-continuation probes.
cycle_146_baseline: FC dimension: stickiness=1.00, drift_mean=0.00, recall=0.33, uncaught_drifts=4/9 (44%). Keyword cascade nails clean cases; ~44% of drifts need Haiku.
cycle_145_experiment: sticky-pointer (conversations table) deployed alongside sync classifier — 7d audit window for inertia hypothesis. If sticky_matched >= 80%, deprecate sync classifier next cycle.

closed_goals.note: Loop investigated for 4 cycles (53-56), shipped Chinese-marker output (+4.2pp), multi-turn lookback (+1.7pp), trigger tightening (cleanup). umbreon SI plateaued at 0.300 due to: (a) ~3 real refusals in window, (b) ~5 false-trigger meta-discussions, (c) ~4 deferred-beyond-3-turn responses. To break past 0.45 would require synthetic SI probes via test chat (out of /loop scope). Goal closed as bench-limited with explicit recalibration; future Path C ship (synthetic probes) can re-open higher target.
Pivoted from stuck SI@umbreon. Authored delegation, cross-locale, priority-stakes, refusal-handling seeds. 33/33 probes pass. pass_rate maintained at 1.000.
5 new rules: no-CronCreate, no-git-amend, no-empty-photo, no-self-config-edit, no-stale-day-reference. All score 1.000 on first run — conventions deeply internalized.
make bench-all + shell-bench all-dims subcommand + ASCII dashboard + JSON snapshot. First run flagged 3 regressions including PD guard violation — proved its value immediately.

Guard cleared via window-size fix (1000 → 300 msgs). Root cause: older messages in larger window had umbreon role-bleed dragging classifier. Pikamini accuracy 1.000 in both windows — never confused. Same root cause explained simultaneous WH and SI regressions that flagged in cycle 59 dashboard.
